description: The most bustling commercial district in Chengdu, a core business area integrating shopping and entertainment.
A famous food street in Chengdu, featuring various Sichuan cuisine snacks, an excellent place to experience the city's vibrant atmosphere.
A folk-style commercial street offering an experience of Western Sichuan customs and traditional snack culture.
A comprehensive museum showcasing Bashu culture and Chengdu's history, providing insights into the rich heritage of the Land of Abundance.

attraction_name: Chengdu Research Base of Giant Panda Breeding
description: A world-renowned research, breeding, and conservation institution for giant pandas, a prime destination to admire China's national treasure.
A preserved Qing Dynasty neighborhood, a classic street to experience the slow-paced lifestyle of old Chengdu.

A UNESCO World Heritage Site and an outstanding example of ancient hydraulic engineering.

description: A renowned venue in Chengdu for Sichuan opera performances, showcasing authentic traditional arts such as face-changing.

The iconic ancient bridge of Dujiangyan, beautifully illuminated at night, a significant scenic spot in Dujiangyan Ancient Town.
